item.title: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd Falls 5.43%: Volatility and Key Events Shape Weekly Performance
item.description: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 11 to 15 May 2026, closing down 5.43% to Rs.2,056.20, underperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63%. The week was marked by a sharp plunge to the lower circuit on the opening day despite the stock hitting new 52-week and all-time highs intraday. Subsequent sessions saw modest recovery attempts amid mixed market conditions, reflecting heightened volatility and investor caution. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Kingfa Science & Technology Declines 3.62% Despite Technical Strength: 4 Key Factors This Week
item.description: Kingfa Science & Technology (India) Ltd experienced a 3.62% decline over the week ending 15 May 2026, closing at Rs.5,184.25 compared to Rs.5,379.15 the previous Friday. Despite this drop, the stock outperformed the Sensex, which fell 2.63% during the same period. The week was marked by a new 52-week and all-time high on 11 May, a subsequent downgrade in valuation sentiment, and a notable upgrade in the company’s investment rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Elpro International Ltd Gains 13.89%: Key Drivers Behind the Week’s Rally
item.description: Elpro International Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 13.89% from Rs.144.35 to Rs.164.40 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by a new 52-week and all-time high on 11 May, followed by mixed trading amid broader market volatility. Key events this week highlight the stock’s resilience and technical strength despite a challenging market backdrop. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Integrated Proteins Ltd Gains 8.36%: 10 Key Factors Driving the Rally
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 8.36% from Rs.114.80 to Rs.124.40 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock hit multiple new 52-week and all-time highs, supported by robust technical indicators and sustained buying interest despite a challenging market environment and sector headwinds. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Cerebra Integrated Technologies Ltd Falls 16.86%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Sharp Decline
item.description: Cerebra Integrated Technologies Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its stock price plunging 16.86% to close at Rs.3.65, significantly underperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by extreme volatility, including both upper and lower circuit hits, heavy selling pressure, and a fresh 52-week low, reflecting deepening concerns about the company’s fundamentals and market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Jindal Drilling Surges 8.59% Amid Technical Shift and Institutional Interest
item.description: Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 8.59% from Rs. 535.85 to Rs. 581.90 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock’s rally was driven by robust intraday surges, heavy institutional participation, and a notable upgrade in technical momentum, marking a pivotal week for this small-cap oil sector player. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: National Aluminium Gains 0.45%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: National Aluminium Company Ltd (NACL) closed the week with a modest gain of 0.45%, rising from Rs.401.80 on 8 May to Rs.403.60 on 15 May 2026, while the Sensex declined 2.63% over the same period. This relative outperformance was driven by a significant upgrade in the company’s investment rating and a notable shift in technical momentum, which together supported the stock’s resilience amid broader market weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Tanla Platforms Ltd Falls 11.87%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Tanla Platforms Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its stock price declining by 11.87% to close at Rs.498.05, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a shift in technical momentum, a downgrade in analyst ratings, and a notable improvement in valuation metrics amid mixed financial signals. These developments collectively shaped the stock’s downward trajectory despite some underlying operational strengths. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: ADC India Communications Ltd Gains 12.47%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Surge
item.description: ADC India Communications Ltd delivered a robust weekly performance, gaining 12.47% from Rs.2,122.50 to Rs.2,387.10 between 11 and 15 May 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined 2.63% over the same period. The stock hit multiple new 52-week and all-time highs, supported by strong technical signals and positive fundamental developments, marking a week of sustained bullish momentum amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Bharat Electronics Ltd Falls 3.65%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL) experienced a turbulent week from 11 to 15 May 2026, closing down 3.65% to Rs.423.60, slightly underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63%. The stock faced significant intraday lows and technical setbacks midweek, followed by a brief rebound, before ending the week with modest losses amid mixed market signals and a downgrade to a 'Hold' rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Indian Overseas Bank Falls 3.02%: Valuation Shift and Technical Momentum Define Week
item.description: Indian Overseas Bank (IOB) closed the week ending 15 May 2026 at Rs.33.77, down 3.02% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.34.82. This decline slightly outpaced the Sensex’s 2.63% fall over the same period, reflecting a week of mixed signals as valuation improvements contrasted with bearish technical momentum. The stock’s price action was influenced by a notable upgrade in valuation attractiveness amid market volatility, followed by a shift to a more cautious technical stance, underscoring the complex dynamics shaping investor sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Genesys International Falls 20.94%: 6 Key Factors Behind the Steep Weekly Decline
item.description: Genesys International Corporation Ltd endured a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its stock price plunging 20.94% to close at Rs.208.35, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 2.63% decline. The week was marked by sharp intraday volatility, multiple rating changes, and deteriorating technical and financial indicators, underscoring the mounting pressures on this small-cap software and consulting firm. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Haldyn Glass Declines 6.73% Amid Downgrade and Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Haldyn Glass Ltd experienced a challenging week on the BSE, closing at Rs.106.00 on 15 May 2026, down 6.73% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.113.65. This decline outpaced the Sensex’s 2.63% fall over the same period, reflecting a combination of a downgrade to a Sell rating and a shift to mildly bearish technical momentum. Despite the stock’s strong long-term outperformance versus the benchmark, short-term pressures and mixed signals dominated investor sentiment this week. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: California Software Company Ltd Falls 5.46%: 7 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: California Software Company Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 11 to 15 May 2026, closing down 5.46% to Rs.22.50 despite an initial surge to new 52-week highs early in the week. The stock outperformed the Sensex’s 2.63% decline but faced sharp reversals midweek, including two consecutive lower circuit hits amid heavy selling pressure. This review analyses the key events and price movements shaping the stock’s volatile performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Vintage Coffee & Beverages Ltd Falls 5.05%: Bearish Technicals and Financial Concerns Weigh
item.description: Vintage Coffee & Beverages Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price declining 5.05% from ₹134.75 to ₹127.95, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a shift to bearish technical momentum, a downgrade to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO, and concerns over financial efficiency and debt levels, all contributing to the stock’s downward trajectory despite its strong long-term performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: PMC Fincorp Ltd Falls 5.39%: Technical Signals and Valuation Shifts Define the Week
item.description: PMC Fincorp Ltd’s shares declined by 5.39% over the week ending 15 May 2026, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63%. Despite a notable technical development signalling potential bullish momentum early in the week, the stock faced persistent selling pressure amid mixed financial results and cautious market sentiment. Valuation improvements and a rating upgrade from Strong Sell to Sell provided some optimism, but the micro-cap NBFC’s challenges remain evident in its price action and fundamentals. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Borosil Renewables Falls 10.89%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Borosil Renewables Ltd experienced a challenging week from 11 to 15 May 2026, with its share price declining by 10.89% to close at Rs.500.50, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63% over the same period. Despite reporting record quarterly profitability and a technical momentum shift, the stock faced persistent selling pressure amid mixed market signals and broader volatility in the industrial products sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Shree Pushkar Chemicals Declines 4.78%: Technical Shifts and Financial Strength Shape Week
item.description: Shree Pushkar Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd experienced a challenging week, with its stock price falling 4.78% from Rs.411.90 to Rs.392.20, underperforming the Sensex which declined 2.63% over the same period. The week was marked by a significant technical momentum shift, an upgrade in investment rating from Sell to Hold, and solid financial results underpinning the company’s fundamentals despite short-term price weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Titan Company Ltd Falls 7.64%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Titan Company Ltd’s shares declined by 7.64% over the week ending 15 May 2026, underperforming the Sensex which fell 2.63%. The stock faced significant selling pressure early in the week, hitting intraday lows and gap down openings amid sectoral weakness and broader market volatility. Despite some technical bullish signals and a strong fundamental backdrop, short-term margin pressures and valuation adjustments contributed to the stock’s volatile performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Tata Investment Corporation Ltd Falls 6.01%: 2 Key Technical Shifts Shape the Week
item.description: Tata Investment Corporation Ltd (TICL) closed the week ending 15 May 2026 at Rs.675.35, down 6.01% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.718.50. This decline outpaced the Sensex’s 2.63% fall over the same period, reflecting a week of mixed technical signals and evolving financial assessments. Despite the stock’s underperformance relative to the benchmark, recent upgrades and technical shifts provide a nuanced picture of the company’s near-term outlook. Time: 1 hour ago
